name: Comment Pulse Board
description: Cluster obsession points, recurring questions, sentiment shifts, and backlash signals across public or user-authorized audience chatter, then produce a source-aware pulse digest.
short_description: Cluster audience chatter into a source-aware pulse digest.
audience: Community managers tracking fast-moving audience questions
Creator teams comparing current chatter with a prior source window
Operators turning comments and support excerpts into response priorities
detail_lines: Clusters repeated topics, questions, praise, confusion, criticism, and backlash signals while preserving source labels.
Compares current and prior windows so rising, stable, cooling, and risky signals are visible without turning the workflow into a full analytics dashboard.
Keeps analysis bounded to public or user-authorized material and rejects targeting, brigading, rumor laundering, or harassment tactics.
